patterns_recognized: D-grade dual-signal-against reliability (78% directional failure through 5/21, 7-of-9): when grade=D AND both SP edge AND PQI simultaneously oppose the model pick, direction has failed at high frequency. Two counter-examples on 5/21 (OAK extras, CLE narrow win) moderate certainty but pattern remains a meaningful DOWNGRADE trigger — applied to HOU@CHC today (SP 1.55 xERA against CHC, PQI Δ=-15.3 against CHC, grade D=-1, negative edge).

F1* thin-sample + F3 sole positive + large PQI headwind (Δ>+20 against pick) = structural DOWNGRADE: WSH@NYM 5/21 lost 2-1 with similar F3-only + no SP support + neutral-to-negative PQI. 5/21 process rule added 'CONFIRM GOLD requires grade≥B- OR SP xERA agrees OR PQI confirms'; today STL@CIN meets B- threshold but F1 carries asterisk and PQI Δ=+27.0 against is in the top-quartile headwind range — DOWNGRADE applied.

HARD CAP 7 near-zero threshold firings have been direction-correct but warrant monitoring: live firings at +0.0014 (MIN@HOU 5/20, direction WIN) and +0.0041 (COL@ARI 5/21, direction WIN). Today fires again at +0.0041 for COL@ARI. Continuing to CONFIRM cap enforcement per rules, but threshold calibration toward ≥0.010 should be re-evaluated once 30+ live samples accumulate.

HARD CAP 1 (negative-edge GOLD/PLATINUM) has blocked every staking loss in the archive with zero exceptions: CHC@ATL, KC@CHW, BOS@KC, TOR@NYY (consecutive), ATL@MIA, LAD@SD across recent weeks — even triple F-signal conviction (MIL@CHC 5/18, F1+F2+F3) lost after cap bypassed staking. Enforce unconditionally regardless of pre-cap grade strength.

C-grade/B- GOLD CONFIRM without verified SP quality support has been the lone process failure category: WSH@NYM 5/21 was the trigger (C-grade GOLD CONFIRM, F3 alone, no SP edge, lost 2-1). New process rule demands grade≥B- AND at least one of SP-agrees or PQI-confirms. LAD@MIL today has only F2 (no F1/F3) + PQI against + negative edge + confidence_downgrade — insufficient for CONFIRM GOLD despite B- grade.

STL @ CIN.reasoning: F1_xera_gap=0.81* (thin Statcast sample) + F3=1986 satisfies HARD CAP 5 technically, but PQI Δ=+27.0 AGAINST STL is a top-quartile late-game headwind. Edge +3.89pp is just below the 4pp floor, so stake is already zero. The 5/21 process pattern flags F1*-only + large PQI-against as DOWNGRADE territory even at B- grade. CIN's superior late-game profile (Δ+27) suggests the full-game margin will erode any Pallante F5 advantage. Directional conviction insufficient to maintain GOLD documentation.

STL @ CIN (G2).reasoning: Chase Petty has 0 Statcast pitches season-to-date (below the 100-pitch minimum). PENDING_SP_DATA protocol applies unconditionally regardless of other signals. No directional pick possible without SP quality anchor. Protocol validated 7+ times in archive.

TB @ NYY.reasoning: Pre-cap score=5 (A) driven by F1_xera_gap=1.00* + F3=6667.3 + SP edge agrees + PQI confirms (Δ=-10.8) + Stage 1/2 agree. HARD CAP 7 correctly fires on hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0130 (TB HL bullpen modestly worse than NYY). Cap is process-correct per 0-for-7 backtest rationale; enforcing B- prevents parlay exposure. confidence_downgrade=True and acute_roster flag add secondary caution. HARD CAP 7 prior live firings have been direction-correct; cap stands.

HOU @ CHC.reasoning: Classic D-grade dual-signal-against pattern: SP edge 1.55 xERA AGAINST CHC pick (Teng/HOU superior to Rea/CHC xERA) and PQI Δ=-15.3 AGAINST CHC. Negative edge (-4.23pp) means market also does not favor CHC — HARD CAP 1 fires implicitly via grade score D (-1). This pattern has failed directionally 78% of the time (7-of-9 through 5/21). Stake is already zero via negative edge; DOWNGRADE documents the structural weakness.

PIT @ TOR.reasoning: Skenes (PIT away SP) holds 4.32 xERA advantage over Corbin (TOR home) with F1=6.16 + F2=0.024 (strong pre-cap B+, score=3). HARD CAP 1 fires on edge=-7.38pp — market already prices PIT at fair_prob=0.6035 (60%), well above the model's 52.97%. Cap correctly enforces: market has superior information about the matchup, possibly Corbin's improved 2026 form. Stage 1/2 disagree (Δ=0.2331) is a secondary concern — late-game edge for TOR. Confirming cap demotion to GOLD (B-).

Without F-signal support and with stacked flags, SKIP is the correct and conservative posture.

CLE @ PHI.reasoning: Wheeler (PHI home SP) holds 1.58 xERA advantage and PQI Δ=+26.9 confirms PHI — pre-cap B+ (score=3) reflects genuine quality. Market is more bullish on PHI than the model; staking at model's price would capture negative EV. HARD CAP 10 fires second. Both caps process-correct; PHI direction is directionally sound but not stakeable.

The 18.73pp edge combined with fair_prob=0.3362 is a market-dominance signal of the highest order. WSH's model probability (52.34%) vs market (33.6%) is an 18.7pp gap suggesting severe model mispricing.
